description_long: This is a sleek, modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large, flat display and a minimalist design. The front features a wide, glossy black screen bordered by a thin bezel, with a landscape image displayed on the monitor. The rear is finished in a dark metallic gray, with a prominent Apple logo centered near the top and a row of ports along the lower left edge. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, curved pedestal stand with a circular cutout, providing stability and a contemporary look. Accompanying the monitor are a slim wireless keyboard and a compact wireless mouse, both in matching light gray. The overall appearance is refined and professional, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A modern, all-in-one Apple desktop computer with a large black display, metallic gray body, and matching wireless keyboard and mouse.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the metallic gray back, Apple logo, stand with circular cutout, and a row of ports on the lower left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the monitor, the curved stand, and the slim keyboard and mouse in front.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large black screen with a landscape image, thin bezel, Apple logo on the bottom bezel, and the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the alignment of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a smooth, glossy finish with rounded corners, providing a modern and minimalistic frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: Curved pedestal stand made of metallic material with a wide base and a circular cutout, offering stability and a contemporary aesthetic.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or stand; any controls are likely integrated or touch-sensitive, but not visible in the images.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the lower left rear panel, with several ports arranged in a horizontal row.
attribute_brand_logo: Apple logo is present, centered on the rear panel and also on the front bottom bezel, both in a contrasting black or dark gray finish.
